name: headroom
description: Headroom context optimization proxy, MCP retrieval tools, and startup hooks for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Runs the Headroom local proxy for Codex, exposes MCP compression/retrieve/stats tools, and works alongside Cognitive Context Manager when CCM is used for durable project memory.
defaultPrompt: Use Headroom to inspect compression stats for this Codex session.
Use Headroom retrieval tools when compressed context markers need expansion.
Use CCM for project memory and Headroom for proxy compression when both plugins are installed.
